mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sensor_data (light_id, illuminance, power, voltage, current, temperature, humidity, sampling_energy, collect_time, create_time) VALUES
(#{item.lightId}, #{item.illuminance}, #{item.power}, #{item.voltage}, #{item.current}, #{item.temperature}, #{item.humidity}, #{item.samplingEnergy}, #{item.collectTime}, NOW())

INSERT INTO sensor_data_hourly (light_id, hour_start, avg_illuminance, avg_power, avg_voltage, avg_current, avg_temperature, avg_humidity, total_energy, data_count, max_power, min_power) VALUES
(#{item.lightId}, #{item.hourStart}, #{item.avgIlluminance}, #{item.avgPower}, #{item.avgVoltage}, #{item.avgCurrent}, #{item.avgTemperature}, #{item.avgHumidity}, #{item.totalEnergy}, #{item.dataCount}, #{item.maxPower}, #{item.minPower})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE avg_illuminance = (avg_illuminance * data_count + VALUES(avg_illuminance)) / (data_count + 1), avg_power = (avg_power * data_count + VALUES(avg_power)) / (data_count + 1), avg_voltage = (avg_voltage * data_count + VALUES(avg_voltage)) / (data_count + 1), avg_current = (avg_current * data_count + VALUES(avg_current)) / (data_count + 1), avg_temperature = (avg_temperature * data_count + VALUES(avg_temperature)) / (data_count + 1), avg_humidity = (avg_humidity * data_count + VALUES(avg_humidity)) / (data_count + 1), total_energy = total_energy + VALUES(total_energy), data_count = data_count + VALUES(data_count), max_power = GREATEST(IFNULL(max_power, 0), VALUES(max_power)), min_power = LEAST(IFNULL(min_power, VALUES(min_power)), VALUES(min_power))
